meaning: Có mặt ở khắp mọi nơi
example: Mobile phones have become ubiquitous in modern society.

meaning: Tỉ mỉ, quá kỹ càng
example: Many hours of meticulous preparation have gone into writing the book.

meaning: Làm giảm nhẹ, làm dịu
example: It is unclear how to mitigate the effects of tourism on the island.

meaning: Có hại, bất lợi
example: These chemicals have a detrimental effect on the environment.

meaning: Sinh lời, kiếm được nhiều tiền
example: He gave up a lucrative career as a lawyer to look after his kids.

meaning: Chưa từng có tiền lệ
example: This century has witnessed environmental destruction on an unprecedented scale.

meaning: Chất xúc tác, tác nhân thúc đẩy
example: The government's new policy acted as a catalyst for economic growth.

meaning: Lỗi thời, không còn được sử dụng
example: Gas lamps became obsolete when electric lighting was invented.

meaning: Kiên cường, mau phục hồi
example: She's a resilient girl - she won't let this failure get her down.

meaning: Xấu đi, tồi tệ hơn
example: The political situation in the region has deteriorated rapidly.

meaning: Có ích, tạo điều kiện thuận lợi
example: Such a noisy environment was not conducive to a good night's sleep.

meaning: Sâu sắc, to lớn
example: The invention of the internet has had a profound impact on how we communicate.

meaning: Làm nhẹ bớt, giảm bớt
example: The drugs did nothing to alleviate her pain.

meaning: Thực dụng, thực tế
example: In business, the pragmatic approach to problems is often more successful than an idealistic one.

meaning: Không thể tránh khỏi
example: The accident was the inevitable consequence of carelessness.

meaning: Dựa trên kinh nghiệm, thực nghiệm
example: This theory needs to be backed up with solid empirical evidence.

meaning: Dao động, lên xuống thất thường
example: Vegetable prices fluctuate according to the season.

meaning: Hữu hình, có thể sờ mó hoặc thấy rõ
example: We need tangible evidence if we're going to take legal action.

meaning: Xem xét kỹ lưỡng
example: He scrutinized the men's faces carefully, trying to work out who was lying.

meaning: Mô hình, hệ nhận thức
example: The widespread use of social media represents a new paradigm in human interaction.

meaning: Điều bí ẩn, người khó hiểu
example: The disappearance of the flight remains a complete enigma to investigators.

meaning: Mơ hồ, có nhiều hơn một nghĩa
example: The government's stance on the issue is largely ambiguous.

meaning: Tiêu diệt, xóa bỏ hoàn toàn
example: The disease that once claimed millions of lives has now been eradicated.

meaning: Khả thi, có thể thực hiện được
example: It's simply not feasible to build a new bridge with the current budget.

meaning: Hòa đồng, thích giao du
example: Emma's a gregarious, outgoing person who loves hosting parties.

meaning: Thực hiện, thi hành (kế hoạch, chính sách)
example: The changes to the national health system will be implemented next year.

meaning: Động lực, sự khích lệ
example: Tax incentives have been very effective in encouraging people to save.

meaning: Đặt cạnh nhau (thường để so sánh)
example: The exhibition juxtaposes Picasso's early drawings with his later works.

meaning: Uể oải, lờ đờ, thiếu năng lượng
example: I was feeling tired and lethargic after eating a massive meal.

meaning: Khét tiếng, có tiếng xấu
example: The company is notorious for paying its bills late.

meaning: Tỏa khắp, lan tràn khắp nơi
example: The influence of Freud is pervasive in her books.

meaning: Hợp lý, có vẻ đúng
example: A bomb was the only plausible explanation for the crash.

meaning: Hậu quả (thường là xấu và kéo dài)
example: Any decrease in tourism could have serious repercussions for the local economy.

meaning: Rải rác, thỉnh thoảng, không thường xuyên
example: There has been sporadic violence in the downtown area.

meaning: Tầm thường, không quan trọng
example: I don't know why he gets so upset about something so trivial.

meaning: Thiết yếu, mang tính sống còn
example: A strong opposition is vital to a healthy democracy.

meaning: Xác minh, làm rõ
example: The police have so far been unable to ascertain the cause of the explosion.

meaning: Hiếu chiến, thích gây gổ
example: He's always very belligerent when he's had too much to drink.

meaning: Chứng thực, củng cố (bằng chứng, ý kiến)
example: Recent research seems to corroborate his theory.

meaning: Sự khác biệt, sự không nhất quán
example: There is a discrepancy between the two reports.

meaning: Làm trầm trọng thêm (một vấn đề, dịch bệnh)
example: This attack will exacerbate the already tense relations between the two communities.

meaning: Hoàn hảo, không tì vết
example: His English is impeccable, you would think he is a native speaker.

meaning: Dễ bị tổn thương, dễ gặp nguy hiểm
example: Older people are especially vulnerable to cold temperatures even inside their homes.

meaning: Hoài nghi, đa nghi
example: Many experts remain skeptical about his claims of having invented a new energy source.

meaning: Dồi dào, phong phú
example: There is abundant evidence that cars have a harmful effect on the environment.

meaning: Bắt buộc
example: Swimming was compulsory at my school, whether you liked it or not.

meaning: Phù phiếm, lãng phí thời gian/tiền bạc
example: I think he sees her as a frivolous young woman with no serious interests.

meaning: Sắp xảy ra (thường là điều xấu)
example: A strike is imminent, which will cause massive disruption to train services.

meaning: Biệt ngữ, từ chuyên môn khó hiểu
example: The instructions were written in such technical jargon that I couldn't understand them.

meaning: Nỗi hoài niệm, sự nhớ về quá khứ
example: Hearing that song again filled him with nostalgia for his college days.

meaning: Mang điềm xấu, đáng lo ngại
example: There was an ominous silence when I asked whether my contract was going to be renewed.

meaning: Điều kiện tiên quyết, bắt buộc phải có trước
example: Passing a written test is a prerequisite for taking the advanced course.

meaning: Dư thừa, bị sa thải (vì không cần thiết nữa)
example: To keep the company alive, half the workforce is being made redundant.

meaning: Tinh tế, không dễ nhận ra
example: The room was painted a subtle shade of pink.

meaning: Kiên trì, ngoan cường, bám dai
example: There has been tenacious local opposition to the new airport.

meaning: Tầm thường, nhàm chán, thuộc về cõi trần
example: Mundane matters such as paying bills and shopping for food do not interest her.

meaning: Dễ bay hơi, dễ biến đổi (tính khí, thị trường)
example: Food and fuel prices are very volatile in a war situation.

meaning: Thuộc về nhận thức, trí não
example: Some of her cognitive functions have been impaired due to the accident.

meaning: Bẩm sinh, thiên phú
example: Cyril's most impressive quality was his innate goodness.

meaning: Khả thi, có thể phát triển được
example: In order to make the company viable, it will unfortunately be necessary to reduce staffing levels.
